action_set_definitions.name: get_session_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the general session information, including project scope, revenue context, and specific disclosure thresholds.

action_set_definitions.name: search_repository
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for keywords or phrases across the entire document repository to identify relevant files for leadership, shareholders, or operations.

query.description: The search term (e.g., 'executive leadership list', 'shareholder registry', 'supply chain').

action_set_definitions.name: list_all_documents
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all document IDs and basic metadata in the repository to establish the review queue.

action_set_definitions.name: get_document_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full text and metadata for a specific document by its ID.

doc_id.description: The unique identifier of the document to read.

example_output.content: This Supply Agreement between Gamma and Supplier X...

action_set_definitions.name: create_audit_flag
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a risk flag for a document, specifying the regulatory trigger and justification.

doc_id.description: ID of the document requiring filing.

regulatory_trigger.description: The specific SEC Regulation S-K Item 601(b)(10) trigger.

justification.description: Brief explanation of why this document meets the materiality threshold or trigger.

state_description.document_repository: A map of document IDs to their metadata, content snippets, and processing status.
state_description.active_document_id: The ID of the document currently 'opened' or 'focused' by the agent.
state_description.audit_flags: A list of risk flags or bookmarks created by the agent during the session.
state_description.review_session_metadata: General session info such as project name, jurisdiction focus, and access level.

CORP-GOV-2024.content_summary: List of Executive Officers: Sarah Chen (CEO), Marcus Thorne (CFO). List of 5% Shareholders: Thorne Capital Group, Blue Horizon Ventures. Note: Marcus Thorne maintains a controlling interest in Thorne Capital Group.

metadata.title: Q3 Operations and Vendor Risk Assessment

OPS-VEND-Q3.content_summary: Risk Analysis: Our production line is entirely dependent on proprietary sensors from 'SensorTech Solutions'. They are our sole-source provider for 92% of our hardware components. A disruption here would halt all revenue for 4-6 months. All other vendors (e.g., Staples, Dell) are non-critical and replaceable within 48 hours.

AGMT-THORNE-001.content_summary: Commercial lease for the company's primary R&D facility located in Palo Alto.

AGMT-SENSOR-992.content_summary: Long-term supply agreement for customized industrial sensors. Includes exclusivity clauses and minimum order quantities.

AGMT-DELL-883.content_summary: Standard purchase agreement for office laptops and server racks. Terms are standard for the industry.

AGMT-CHEN-005.content_summary: Standard employee intellectual property assignment. No additional compensation beyond base salary.
